description_long: This flower shop is a single-story commercial building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior features large windows, allowing natural light to flood the interior and providing clear views of the shop's displays. The building is surrounded by a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees, with a driveway and parking area on one side, and landscaped greenery and shrubs near the entrance. The shop includes a visible garage or storage area, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small patio with potted plants and outdoor seating. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on accessibility and curb appeal.
description: A modern, single-story flower shop with large windows, flat roof, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a driveway and patio entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance with patio, and a variety of trees and shrubs around the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, additional landscaping, and the garage or storage area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, garage, and more of the building's modern facade.
